name: Mushroom Stuffed Wontons
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup heavy cream or half & half
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter over moderate heat and add mushroom, onion, and garlic.
2. Saute, stirring until the mushrooms begin to give off liquid. Add the chopped chile, sherry or port, soy sauce, vinegar, and tarragon or rosemary.
3. Simmer until the liquid is absorbed.
4. Add heavy cream or half & half, black pepper, and parsley, stirring until the mixture is thick (if necessary, add a small amount of flour to thicken).
5. Fill wonton wrappers, sealing them on the diagonal and flattening the bottoms.
6. Heat oil in a skillet and fry the wontons until the bottoms are lightly browned. Add 1/2 cup water, cover, and bring just to a boil; reduce heat and simmer about 10 minutes, until the water has evaporated. Let the wontons sit over medium heat, shaking the pan, until the bottoms are browned and lightly crunchy.
